goal: Unify remaining direct asset literals in tracked mainline presentation screens to shared asset path helpers without changing gameplay behavior or deleting content.
constraints: Do not delete any card/image/audio/content assets.
Do not modify gameplay rules, card data semantics, or deck composition.
Keep diffs minimal and limited to tracked mainline UI files.
deliverables: CharactersView uses shared asset path helper for background and stand image URLs.
PreFactionLoading uses shared asset path helper for background URL.
Task passes typecheck and task scope/finalize gates.
